name: backpack
description: What you pack to take into the /sandbox container. Declares the tools, runtimes, and project-setup commands a project needs so they're automatically restored on every container rebuild. Slash commands: /backpack:add, /backpack:remove, /backpack:list, /backpack:install, /backpack:audit. A PostToolUse hook on Bash detects install commands and proposes pre-filled /backpack:add invocations the agent can decide to keep or skip.
